title: CBSE OSM row: Delhi HC refuses to extend verification and re-evaluation window for class 12 exams
description: The Delhi High Court on Friday refused to pass any orders to keep the CBSE Class XII exam verification and re-evaluation portal open for more time, amid concerns about alleged irregularities in the board's On-Screen Marking (OSM) system.A vacation bench of Justices Neena Bansal Krishna and Madhu Jain said that passing such an order would eventually lead to a delay in the exam results and that it did not want to cause that.
